summary: The user is seeking inspiration for their next sculpting project, focusing on abstract sculpture using wire mesh and metal armatures. They have been taking sculpting classes for three months and are experimenting with different materials and techniques, specifically aiming to create an abstract piece that captures the movement and flow of a wave.
facts: The user has been taking sculpting classes for three months. The user is experimenting with wire mesh and metal armatures for their next project. The user is inspired by YouTube tutorials for their sculpting techniques. The user is thinking of creating an abstract sculpture that evokes the movement of water. The user plans to experiment with different wire mesh densities and weaves to achieve a sense of movement. The user intends to bend and shape the wire mesh into curved forms to represent wave movement. The user is considering incorporating a kinetic element into their armature for dynamic movement.
